# Wright by the Beach

> A 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath oceanside vacation rental in Kill Devil Hills, North Carolina (Outer Banks), sleeping up to 10 guests. A flat, no-stairs 5-minute walk (352 yards) to the beach via Raleigh Avenue. Managed and booked through Resort Realty.

## Key facts

- Address: 110 Baker Avenue, Kill Devil Hills, NC 27948
- Sleeps 10 across 5 bedrooms (two king suites, one queen, two double-over-double bunk rooms, one twin), 3.5 bathrooms, 4 levels
- Beach access: Raleigh Avenue (recommended, no stairs) or Ferris Avenue, both with paved parking, ADA-accessible overlook, outdoor shower
- Amenities: private hot tub, ocean-view sun decks, rec room with foosball, chef-ready kitchen, keyless entry, complimentary linens and made beds, free beach gear (chairs, umbrellas, and more via the VayK Life program)
- Pet friendly: dogs allowed, crate provided, pet fee applies
- Check-in: 4:00 PM, check-out: 10:00 AM
- Non-smoking property
- Booking and cancellation policy handled by Resort Realty: (800) 458-3830
- Nearby: Wright Brothers Memorial, Jockey's Ridge State Park, Avalon Pier, NC Aquarium on Roanoke Island, Bodie Island Lighthouse

## Pages

- [Home](https://wrightbythebeach.com/): Overview, highlights, and booking widget
- [Amenities](https://wrightbythebeach.com/amenities): Full amenities list
- [Photo Gallery](https://wrightbythebeach.com/gallery): Photos of every room and view
- [Area Guide](https://wrightbythebeach.com/area): Nearby Outer Banks attractions and restaurants
- [FAQ](https://wrightbythebeach.com/faq): Booking, pets, check-in, and policy questions answered directly
- [Book](https://wrightbythebeach.com/book): Check availability and book (hands off to Resort Realty's checkout)
